title: Updating a new board's owner via GraphQL (in make.com)
excerpt:
Hi - Trying to work out how we can update a new board’s owner using GraphQL (using Make.com), and specifically what the owner (people?) object should look like as part of the mutation. 
Any ideas where I can find an exam…

posts.author: Bezalel (Bezalel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi - Trying to work out how we can update a new board’s owner using GraphQL (using Make.com), and specifically what the owner (people?) object should look like as part of the mutation.
Any ideas where I can find an example of this?

Thanks!

posts.author: Bezalel (Bezalel)
posts.cookedHtml: I found the solution - instead of creating the board using make’s Monday module and then trying to update that board, I created the entire board (including the owner) using GraphQL and it just worked

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Bezalel,

I am glad you found a solution
